results.title: But what is a neural network? | Deep learning chapter 1
results.reason: Widely regarded as the gold standard for visual intuition, with comments consistently praising the 'aha' moments regarding neurons and layers.
summary: How computers see images using small numbers
The way layers connect to find patterns
How simple parts build up complex ideas
The basic math behind artificial brain cells

results.title: The Essential Main Ideas of Neural Networks
results.reason: Josh Starmer's signature style breaks down complex math into 'small, simple steps' that viewers find uniquely non-intimidating.
summary: How to use data to make predictions
The role of simple lines and curves
How the computer fixes its own mistakes
Building blocks that make smart decisions

results.title: 1: Introduction to Neural Networks and Deep Learning; Training Deep NNs
results.reason: High academic rigor from MIT that provides excellent structure, though the pace and length may be intimidating for absolute beginners.
summary: Foundations of how machines learn from data
Teaching a computer to recognize specific things
Ways to make learning faster and better
Real world uses for these smart systems

results.title: How Deep Neural Networks Work - Full Course for Beginners
results.reason: A comprehensive marathon course that viewers appreciate for its 'zero to hero' approach, though its length requires significant commitment.
summary: Step by step guide to building software
How to organize information in a network
Testing the system to see if it works
Complete overview of modern computer learning

results.title: Watching Neural Networks Learn
results.reason: Excellent use of visualization to show the 'learning' process, which viewers find highly effective for conceptual understanding.
summary: Visual look at how computers gain knowledge
Watching patterns change as the system learns
How the network improves over many tries
Seeing the hidden logic inside the machine
